# HeadySystems

> The World's First Sovereign AI Operating System

HeadySystems is the core platform of the Heady AI ecosystem — a sovereign AI operating system providing federated routing, auto-success remediation, orchestration, and real-time drift detection across production domains.

## Docs

- [HeadySystems](https://headysystems.com): Main website
- [HeadySystems](https://headysystems.com): Core platform
- [HeadyMe](https://headyme.com): Personal AI identity
- [HeadyMCP](https://headymcp.com): MCP Protocol Hub
- [HeadyConnection](https://headyconnection.org): Nonprofit arm
- [HeadyAPI](https://headyapi.com): API layer
- [HeadyIO](https://headyio.com): I/O Platform
- [HeadyBuddy](https://headybuddy.org): AI Companion
- [HeadyWeb](https://headyweb.com): Web Platform
- [HeadyDocs](https://headydocs.com): Documentation

## Optional

- The Heady ecosystem uses the Heady Conductor Fault Protocol (HCFP) for auto-success remediation
- All domains are part of a federated AI operating system with 20+ orchestration nodes
- Built with phi-scaled architecture for sovereign AI deployment
